body:
If you haven’t already, check out our [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/Expensify/ReactNativeChat/blob/main/contributingGuides/CONTRIBUTING.md) for onboarding and email contributors@expensify.com to request to join our Slack channel! ___ **Issue reported by:** @clarajones-expensify **Slack conversation** (hyperlinked to channel name): [#product](https://expensify.slack.com/archives/C03U7DCU4/p1776107206437839) ## Action Performed: 1. Create a Control workspace 2. Add a bunch of members, give some of them admin and auditor roles. 3. Set up a couple of different approval workflows. ## Expected Result: _This is a feature request_ 1. Add a role filter selector to the Members page in the workspace settings. When search box is not present: When search box is present: _Note: Follow the existing selector found on the domain members page._ 2. The default selection is "All members" 3. The available options are as follows: - **Control workspaces:** - All members - Admins - Approvers - Auditors - **Collect workspaces:** - All members - Admins - Approvers _Note: Collect workspaces don't show the `Auditors` option in the menu because that role is only available on Control workspaces._ 4. If a selection is made and none of the members match the current filters, show an empty state with the same illustration from the domain members page, but with the below copy change: >**No members match this filter** >Invite a member or change the filter above. ## Actual Result: We don't support this member filtering on NewDot currently. ## Workaround: Yes, go back to Classic where you can filter the members table. ## Platforms: Select the officially supported platforms where the issue was reproduced: - [x] Android: App - [x] Android: mWeb Chrome - [x] iOS: App - [x] iOS: mWeb Safari - [x] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [x] Windows: Chrome - [x] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos In-line above. If you haven’t already, check out our [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/Expensify/ReactNativeChat/blob/main/contributingGuides/CONTRIBUTING.md) for onboarding and email contributors@expensify.com to request to join our Slack channel! ___ **Version Number:** v9.3.59-3 **Reproducible in staging?:** Yes **Reproducible in production?:** Yes **If this was caught during regression testing, add the test name, ID and link from BrowserStack:** https://github.com/Expensify/App/pull/87152 **Email or phone of affected tester (no customers):** kiatest.78+ck414264@gmail.com **Issue reported by:** Applause Internal Team **Bug source:** Pull Request QA execution **Device used:** iPhone 16/iOS 18.7.1 **App Component:** Other ## Action Performed: Precondition: User located in US location 1. Launch Hybrid app 2. Create a new account using track intent 3. Go to workspace settings & enable invoices feature 3. Go to the Invoices page of a workspace. 4. Click Add Bank Account 5. Finish Plaid flow using Regions bank 6. Select the ...0000 account and click Next 7. Click the back button and select the ...1111 account 8. Continue adding required details 9. Observe Personal bank account animation is displayed 10. Click Continue or back button & observe user lands on Add BA page with Plaid and Connect manually options 11. Go back to invoice page & observe no bank account is added ## Expected Result: On step 7 & 8 - VBA flow should be triggered instead of PBA flow so user able to add BA successfully in invoices page ## Actual Result: On step 8 - DOB, SSN steps are missed in personal info step & also company info steps are not displayed. PBA flow get triggered instead of VBA while adding BA in invoices page Note: Bank account cannot be added from invoices page on first attempt for new accounts. It works as expected only after second attempt ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: - [ ] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [x] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [ ] Windows: Chrome - [ ] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/846f9d5e-6e7d-4656-ae11-e678c0a1bacd [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)

If you haven’t already, check out our [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/Expensify/ReactNativeChat/blob/main/contributingGuides/CONTRIBUTING.md) for onboarding and email contributors@expensify.com to request to join our Slack channel! ___ **Version Number:** v9.3.59-3 **Reproducible in staging?:** Yes **Reproducible in production?:** Yes **If this was caught during regression testing, add the test name, ID and link from BrowserStack:** https://test-management.browserstack.com/projects/2219752/test-runs/TR-18133/folder/13176726/41237089/1327742405?sort=-identifier **Email or phone of affected tester (no customers):** leungbratt6+130410@gmail.com **Issue reported by:** Applause Internal Team **Bug source:** Regression TC Execution **Device used:** iPhone 14 / iOS 26.1 **App Component:** Left Hand Navigation (LHN) ## Action Performed: Setup - Can be executed in a Secondary device or browser 1. Go to staging.new.expensify.com 2. Register as a new user to the app 3. Select “Chat and split expenses with friends” and click Continue 4. Enter first and last names, then click Continue 5. Click the Find icon in the upper right corner of the LHN 6. Add an email address that does not have an Expensify account, click on it in the list below (Should be a real account with an inbox that can receive the invite) 7. Send a “Hello!” message to the new user in the DM chat Steps - Main testing device (wait about 10 - 15 minutes to receive the email) 8. Open the email inbox of the invited user 9. From the unread message email/invite, click on the link at the bottom of the email to navigate to new.expensify.com 10. Verify you do not need to use a magic link 11. Open Concierge chat 12. Verify that the app has generated a welcome message and onboarding tasks in Concierge chat ## Expected Result: Verify the listed tasks are as follows: Take a 2-minute tour, Start a chat (checked off & struck through), Split an expense, Enable your wallet. (TC Step 17) ## Actual Result: Missing the Enable your wallet task ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: - [x] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [x] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [x] Windows: Chrome - [ ] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/e3ab1a66-46bc-409b-aafc-f7d972e1ae6b [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)

Mark as paid from the global + button 1. Go to the Inbox tab (not inside any specific chat) 2. Tap the global + button 3. Start a send money flow and select Test User B as the recipient 4. Enter an amount and tap Next 5. On the confirmation page, tap Mark as paid Scenario 4. Pay with Wallet from the global + button 1. Go to the Inbox tab 2. Tap the global + button 3. Start a send money flow, select Test User B 4. Enter an amount and tap Next 5. On the confirmation page, tap Pay with wallet ## Expected Result: Step 5. title: [$250] Rules - Cards empty state shows "All cards already have a rule" when workspace has no card

body:
If you haven’t already, check out our [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/Expensify/ReactNativeChat/blob/main/contributingGuides/CONTRIBUTING.md) for onboarding and email contributors@expensify.com to request to join our Slack channel! ___ **Version Number:** 9.3.59-0 **Reproducible in staging?:** Yes **Reproducible in production?:** N/A - new feature, doesn't exist in prod **If this was caught during regression testing, add the test name, ID and link from BrowserStack:** https://github.com/Expensify/App/pull/87419 **Email or phone of affected tester (no customers):** applausetester+khcategory20@applause.expensifail.com **Issue reported by:** Applause Internal Team **Bug source:** Exploratory - Significant User Experience Deterioration **Device used:** Mac 26.2 / Chrome **App Component:** Workspace Settings ## Action Performed: Precondition: - Workspace is set up with Expensify Card feature, but no Expensify card is assigned. - Rules are enabled. 1. Go to staging.new.expensify.com 2. Go to workspace settings > Rules. 3. Click Add spend rule. 4. Click Choose cards. ## Expected Result: Cards empty state will not show "All cards already have a rule" when workspace has no card. ## Actual Result: Cards empty state shows "All cards already have a rule" when workspace has no card. ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: - [ ] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [ ] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [ ] Windows: Chrome - [x] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/e7127be9-11a5-46d7-a07c-6124fca2d686 [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)
